commit.message:
feat: redesign search terms toolbar and add data delay tooltip (#128)

Reorganized the search terms page toolbar into a single compact row:
- Date presets (LATEST DAY, LAST WEEK, CUSTOM) moved to the left edge
- Search input, rank filters, and right-aligned stats in one h-9 toolbar
- Removed separate metadata row; folded key info (data date, stats) into main toolbar
- Replaced red "X days behind" warning with subtle (i) info icon
- Info icon shows tooltip explaining Amazon data delay (typically 2–3 days)
- Date range now displays as "March 2, 2026" instead of raw "2026-03-03"
- Added coss Tooltip component for polished popover behavior
- Matches brutalist paneled aesthetic of rest of app

Changes run `bun run lint:fix`.

Co-authored-by: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Misc fixes and improvements across components

- Update skills lock and gitignore
- Fix SOPs client components
- Improve quotes modal and detail components
- Refactor useAutoSave hook
- Update auth and navbar
- Minor fixes to accounting, SMS, and form components

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix LangSmith tracing in FastAPI app

api/main.py was missing the env normalization that bridges
LANGCHAIN_TRACING_V2 and LANGSMITH_TRACING. New LangSmith SDK
requires LANGSMITH_TRACING to be set; old SDK used LANGCHAIN_TRACING_V2.
This ensures both are populated when LANGSMITH_API_KEY is present.

🔒 SÉCURITÉ MAJEURE: Correction complète XSS + Auth + Validations + SEO

## 🚨 CORRECTIONS CRITIQUES

### XSS éliminés (4 fichiers)
- ✅ Ajout fonction escapeHtml() dans commande.html, confirmation.html, gestion-be-2026/index.html
- ✅ Échappement COMPLET: item.nom, item.components, item.image_url, client_prenom, client_telephone
- ✅ Remplacement document.write() par Blob + URL.createObjectURL() (facture PDF)

### Auth admin SÉCURISÉE (BREAKING)
- ✅ Code A5qYIeJatg stocké côté serveur (Supabase Secret)
- ✅ Authentification via Edge Function /admin-auth (validation serveur)
- ✅ Token JWT au lieu du code en localStorage
- ⚠️ Admins doivent se reconnecter une fois avec A5qYIeJatg

### Validations strictes
- ✅ Email: regex RFC 5322 + pattern HTML5
- ✅ Téléphone: format français uniquement
- ✅ Prénom: lettres 2-50 caractères
- ✅ Notes: limite 500 caractères

### RLS sécurisée avec logging
- ✅ Table order_access_log pour tracker accès
- ✅ Table rate_limit_tracking pour bloquer IPs abusives
- ✅ Migration SQL: supabase/migrations/20260306_secure_rls.sql

## 📊 SEO OPTIMISÉ

### Fichiers créés
- ✅ robots.txt (indexer /, bloquer /gestion-be-2026/)
- ✅ sitemap.xml (2 URLs)

### Meta tags enrichis
- ✅ OpenGraph (Facebook, LinkedIn)
- ✅ Twitter Cards
- ✅ JSON-LD (Rich Snippets Google)
- ✅ Keywords optimisés
- ✅ Description allongée (172 car.)

## 🔍 AUDIT DE SÉCURITÉ

✅ AUDIT 1: 0 service_role key exposée
✅ AUDIT 2: 0 code admin hardcodé
✅ AUDIT 3: 3 fonctions escapeHtml présentes
✅ AUDIT 4: 0 document.write dangereux
✅ AUDIT 5: 6 validations strictes
✅ AUDIT 6: 2 appels admin-auth
✅ AUDIT 7: innerHTML uniquement avec données système (pas user input)
✅ AUDIT 8: 34 queries Supabase paramétrées (.eq)
✅ AUDIT 9: 14 CORS headers restreints à beyrouth.express
✅ AUDIT 10: 5 secrets Supabase configurés
✅ AUDIT 11: .gitignore protège fichiers sensibles

## 📁 FICHIERS MODIFIÉS

- index.html (validations + SEO)
- commande.html (XSS fix)
- confirmation.html (XSS fix)
- gestion-be-2026/index.html (XSS fix + auth)
- gestion-be-2026/login.html (auth sécurisée)
- robots.txt (nouveau)
- sitemap.xml (nouveau)
- supabase/migrations/20260306_secure_rls.sql (nouveau)
- AUDIT-SECURITE-COMPLET-6MARS.md (rapport détaillé)
- CORRECTIONS-APPLIQUEES-6MARS.md (documentation)

gateway with self-signed certificates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make npx the primary setup path so one-liner actually works

The README led with `gdcli mcp` which requires gdcli on PATH — users
got "success" from `claude mcp add` but the server silently failed.
Now npx -y gdcli-godot is the default, and install.js progress goes
to stderr so it doesn't corrupt the JSON-RPC channel.

commit.message:
Fix chart: skip first (rollingDays-1) points where window is incomplete

The rolling average for index i uses only i+1 values when i < rollingDays-1,
making those early points under-sampled. Now the line and dots only start
from the first index where a full window of data is available.

Replace generic upload with named artifact slots and per-slot validation

Step 3 now shows explicit upload slots derived from task data (deliverable,
prompt history, architecture explanation). Each slot has its own file input
with a green check mark when filled. Submit button disabled until all
required artifacts are uploaded. Removed the free-text paste area.

reads. 237 tests passing.

commit.message:
data: shrink LA bounding box to exclude Antelope Valley (lat_max 34.85 → 34.40)

Areas north of 34.40° (Lancaster, Palmdale, Rosamond) have exit $/SF well
below build cost (~$268 median vs $400+ cost). Cutting them saves ~30% of
API calls, ~11% of listings, and ~18% pipeline time. Santa Clarita (34.38°)
remains included. Also includes pending Malibu zoning + LA County DRP URL fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add completion, snippets, and autoCloseTags to lang-javascript (#21)

Ports the following from @codemirror/lang-javascript:
- localCompletionSource: completes identifiers defined in the local scope
- scopeCompletionSource: completes from a user-supplied global object map
- snippets: JS snippet completions (class, define, import, for loops, etc.)
- typescriptSnippets: TS-specific snippet completions (interface, type, etc.)
- autoCloseTags: Extension that auto-closes JSX tags on typing '>' or '/'

Also adds CompletionPathResult data class and completionPath() utility for
resolving the dotted property path at the cursor position.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix grid mode stopping when Transport is not running

play() uses AudioContext time directly and works regardless of Transport
state, but playGrid() relies on Tone.Transport.scheduleRepeat() which
only fires when the Transport is started. After pressing Stop, the
Transport is halted while free-running samples continue playing — so
enabling Grid on a live sample would stop it and never restart it.

Fix: check Transport.state before scheduleRepeat and restart if needed.
Also surface player.start() errors in the fire callback instead of
swallowing them silently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(broadcasts): variações independentes por campanha com upload de mídia

Cada variação de mensagem agora tem seu próprio tipo (texto, imagem, vídeo,
áudio, documento) e arquivo de mídia. Substitui o modelo antigo de tipo único
com múltiplos textos por uma tabela BroadcastVariation com tipo, texto e mídia
independentes. UI refatorada para tabela + modal de criação/edição por variação.

- Nova tabela BroadcastVariation (1:N com Broadcast)
- Controller aceita multipart com variations JSON + file-0, file-1, etc.
- Service faz upload de cada arquivo para Storage separadamente
- Processor sorteia variação aleatória por destinatário, resolve storage keys
- Frontend: tabela de variações + Dialog modal para adicionar/editar cada uma
- Dropzone de arquivo substitui input de URL para uploads de mídia
- Campo de legenda separado removido (texto da variação serve como legenda)

commit.message:
Dashboard: XREF analysis panel, callgraph tabbed sidebar, FLOSS progress polling

Functions page: add XREF button that opens enriched analysis panel (XREFS/STRINGS/CODE
tabs) without requiring decompilation. XREFS tab shows suspicious APIs with risk badges,
triage dots on callers/callees, and clickable entries that navigate to the target function
with highlight animation. Unified detail panel shared between DEC and XREF buttons.

Callgraph page: tabbed sidebar (INFO/XREFS/STRINGS/CODE) with lazy-loaded content and
per-node caching. Dagre hierarchical layout via cytoscape-dagre extension with automatic
fallback to breadthfirst/cose if dagre fails. Error handling on graph load and init.

Backend: /api/function-analysis endpoint combining xrefs, suspicious API detection
(via CATEGORIZED_IMPORTS_DB), strings, and complexity. FLOSS Vivisect progress polling
splits workspace load from analysis, polling function discovery count every 3s with
time-based exponential progress curve.

feat: stream JSON renderer UI for Claude Code (#69)

* feat: add StreamRenderer component with block views

Renders parsed stream messages from the Zustand store into a
structured conversation view. Components:
- TextBlockView: pre-wrapped monospace text
- ThinkingBlockView: collapsible thinking content
- ToolCallBlockView: tool name badge + collapsible JSON input
- MessageGroup: header (role, model, streaming dot) + blocks + footer

Matches terminal background via theme props. All Tailwind styling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add rendered/raw view toggle to AgentStatusBar

Shows a toggle button when a pane has stream data (paneViewMode set).
Clicking switches between 'rendered' (StreamRenderer) and 'raw'
(Terminal) views via store.setViewMode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: integrate StreamRenderer into Pane with view mode

When viewMode is 'rendered', Pane shows StreamRenderer instead of
Terminal. The terminal cache handles remounts gracefully when switching
back to raw mode. Dim overlay applies to both views.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update HANDOFF.md — review complete

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: persist agent startup command + strip ANSI in parser

setLaunchMode now saves the constructed agent command (e.g.
'claude --output-format stream-json') to config.startupCommand.
Previously only launchMode was persisted, so on app restart the
PTY reopened as a plain shell without the stream-json flag —
the parser received normal terminal output and never parsed anything.

Also adds ANSI escape stripping in parseLine() so JSON lines
wrapped in terminal codes (common in PTY output) are parsed
correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: review findings — accessibility, exhaustiveness, error logging

StreamRenderer:
- Add explicit 'tool_result' case in BlockView + console.warn default
- Add console.warn in JSON formatting catch block
- Add size guard (100KB) before pretty-printing large tool input
- Add aria-expanded on collapsible buttons
- Add focus-visible ring on collapsible buttons
- Add role="log" + aria-label on scroll container
- Add motion-reduce:animate-none on streaming pulse indicator

AgentStatusBar:
- Add focus-visible ring on view mode toggle
- Add aria-pressed + aria-label on toggle button
- Use explicit viewMode !== undefined check
- Simplify toggle label to {viewMode}

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: replace nested ternary with IIFE in Pane content area

Extract the showLauncher/viewMode/terminal three-way ternary into
an immediately-invoked function expression with if/else for
readability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update HANDOFF.md — review fixes applied

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add message input to StreamRenderer + format mismatch diagnostic

- Add MessageInput component: textarea with Enter to send, Shift+Enter
  for newline, Escape to clear, auto-resize, Stop button when streaming
- Writes user input to PTY via window.api.writePty
- Add paneStreamDataReceived store state to detect when parser receives
  PTY data but finds no JSON events (format mismatch diagnostic)
- Show contextual empty state: "Waiting for agent output..." when no data,
  or "Receiving data but no stream events detected" when data arrives
  but parser can't parse it (suggests checking --output-format flag)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove --output-format stream-json, render ANSI-stripped text

--output-format stream-json only works with --print mode (confirmed
from Claude Code CLI help). In interactive PTY mode it's silently
ignored, so the NDJSON parser never receives any JSON events.

Changes:
- Remove --output-format stream-json from AGENT_LAUNCH_CONFIG
- Default agent panes to 'raw' view mode (terminal works immediately)
- Accumulate ANSI-stripped PTY text in paneStreamText store state
- StreamRenderer now shows clean text when NDJSON isn't available,
  falling back gracefully: structured messages > raw text > waiting
- Export stripAnsi from claude-code parser for store reuse
- Keep NDJSON parser as secondary path for future --print mode support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: implement --print mode streaming for Claude Code rendered view

- Use `--print --verbose --output-format stream-json --include-partial-messages`
  for proper NDJSON streaming (discovered that stream-json requires --verbose)
- Agent panes no longer auto-start — user sends first message via chat input,
  which constructs the CLI command with heredoc for safe message passing
- Multi-turn via `--resume SESSION_ID` extracted from result events
- Parser now handles verbose format: system, assistant, rate_limit_event,
  result top-level types alongside stream_event envelopes
- Default view mode changed to 'rendered' (NDJSON parsing is now reliable)
- Removed raw text fallback view (RawTextView) — no longer needed
- Send button disabled while agent is streaming
- 297 tests passing, 6 new parser tests for verbose format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent old startup command from launching interactive Claude in agent panes

- Agent panes (claude-code) now always start with a plain shell, ignoring
  any saved startupCommand from previous sessions
- Strip CLAUDECODE env var from PTY to prevent "nested sessions" error
  when spawning claude --print inside the app

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update HANDOFF.md — --print mode streaming architecture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: always mount terminal for agent panes, show status bar before process detection

- Terminal always mounted behind StreamRenderer overlay for agent panes,
  so the xterm cache accumulates PTY data and raw view toggle works
- AgentStatusBar shown based on launchMode (not just process detection),
  ensuring the raw/rendered toggle button is always available
- Dim overlay gets z-20 to stay above StreamRenderer (z-10)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent terminal from stealing focus in rendered mode

When the terminal is behind the StreamRenderer overlay, its focus
effect would steal focus from the chat textarea input. Now passes
isFocused={false} to TerminalView when in rendered mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve focus stealing and invisible errors in agent rendered mode

Root cause: when user clicks Claude Code in launcher, the first render
has viewMode=undefined (useStreamJsonParser effect hasn't fired yet).
TerminalView mounts with isFocused=true, xterm steals focus. When
StreamRenderer overlay appears on the next render, its textarea never
gets focus. User types but keystrokes go to the hidden terminal — Claude
is never called.

Fixes:
- Default viewMode to 'rendered' for agent panes (no undefined gap)
- Auto-focus StreamRenderer textarea on mount
- Use \r line endings in sendAgentMessage (consistent with PTY conventions)
- Add error logging to all sendAgentMessage guard clauses
- Add .catch() to writePty call
- Show raw PTY output as fallback when parser produces no JSON messages
  (makes CLI errors like "command not found" visible)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: restore agent auto-start — Claude launches immediately on pane open

setLaunchMode now builds the startup command from AGENT_LAUNCH_CONFIG
(interactive TUI mode with --output-format stream-json) instead of
passing null. Reverts defaultFlags from --print mode back to interactive.
sendAgentMessage simplified to write directly to the running TUI PTY.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: switch to --print mode for StreamRenderer chat UX

Agent panes now use --print --verbose --output-format stream-json
--include-partial-messages (non-interactive). Shell spawns on pane open,
then sendAgentMessage constructs the CLI command with heredoc for each
user message. Multi-turn uses --resume with session ID from result events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

to detect Telegram context and get the user ID for sendDocument.

commit.message:
Fix Claude Code MCP: write to ~/.claude.json not just settings.json

Claude Code reads MCP servers from ~/.claude.json (top-level mcpServers),
not from ~/.claude/settings.json. The cortex MCP server was only being
written to settings.json, so Claude Code never detected it.

Now configureClaude() writes to both files:
- ~/.claude.json for MCP server registration (where Claude Code reads)
- ~/.claude/settings.json for hooks and backwards compatibility

Also updates uninstall to clean up ~/.claude.json.
